acceptance.kill: generic high-genus f3 plus fresh f4 half-cover or class that only works after forgetting K
acceptance.promote: low-genus/sourceable/recurrent K/Sroot class preserving K-square rationality

compute: branch divisor degree and support field degrees over P1_Sroot
Sroot -> -Sroot decomposition and descent to K
whether the class preserves the rational K-square stratum
cas_tasks.kill_if: class only appears after forgetting K-square rationality or is high/generic
cas_tasks.name: Recover normalized Sroot branch class for f3
cas_tasks.promote_if: stable low-genus/sourceable Sroot class that survives K quotient checks

compute: whether signed Sroot is essential or the relation descends to K
first falsifier showing f4 is a fresh independent half-cover
cas_tasks.kill_if: successive classes are unrelated fresh Kummer covers
cas_tasks.name: Compare f4/f3 after f3 is named
cas_tasks.promote_if: one K/Sroot class or correspondence controls multiple selected gates

do_not_run: K/Sroot bucket production without a named class
K-line even or reciprocal quartic subfamilies already killed
